Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First I need to look at the event log and identify which activities are repeated Let me go through each case and note the activities

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Looking at the first case C001 the activities are Initiate Request Verify Documents Call Customer Submit Additional Verify Documents again and Approve Request So Verify Documents appears twice here

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Next case C002 has Initiate Request Verify Documents Call Customer twice Adjust Account and Approve Request Here Call Customer occurs twice

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case C003 includes Initiate Request Verify Documents twice Call Customer Adjust Account and Approve Request

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The first time the agent checks identity documents and the second time after the customer submits additional ID scan So the context is different the first is initial verification the second is a recheck after new info is added

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The first call is to clarify an account discrepancy and the second is a follow up to confirm adjustments So the context here is different one is to resolve an issue the other to confirm a fix

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Wait in C002 Adjust Account is after the first call and in C003 it is after the customer steps out So maybe Adjust Account is used in different contexts one to correct discrepancies another due to missing info

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So maybe Verify Documents Initial and Verify Documents Recheck

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Alternatively Verify Documents Initial Verification and Verify Documents After Submission

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For Call Customer maybe Call Customer Request Missing Docs Clarify Account Discrepancy Confirm Adjustments Made and Prompt Customer Return

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Perhaps we can generalize based on the context

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For example in C001 the call is to request missing documents so maybe Call to Request Missing Documents In C002 first call is to clarify an issue so Clarify Account Discrepancy and the second is a follow up so Confirm Adjustments Made In C003 the call is to prompt the customer to return so Prompt Customer Return

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: For Adjust Account in C002 maybe Adjust Account Post Discrepancy Clarification In C003 Adjust Account Due to Missing Information

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The other activities like Initiate Request and Approve Request do not seem to have duplicates within the same case so they can stay as they are Submit Additional in C001 is a unique activity

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Let me check each case again to ensure I am not missing any other duplicates

Name: Validation - PE
Text: In C001 Verify Documents twice so renamed as Initial and Recheck In C002 Call Customer twice so first is Clarify second is Confirm In C003 Verify Documents twice so initial and post adjustment

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait Adjust Account is in C002 and C003 but not in the same case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the only duplicates are Verify Documents in C001 and C003 and Call Customer in C001 C002 and C003

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Case C001 First Verify Documents Initial verification Second Verify Documents After customer submitted additional docs so maybe Re verify Documents Post Submission

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Case C002 First Call Customer Clarify account discrepancy Second Call Customer Confirm adjustments made

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Case C003 First Verify Documents Physical verification since it is a branch maybe Verify Documents Physical Second Verify Documents After account adjustment so Re verify Documents Post Adjustment

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The task is to rename activities that appear multiple times within the same case So Adjust Account in C003 is once so no change needed Similarly in C002 Adjust Account is once

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Justification for each rename Verify Documents in C001 First instance is initial verification second is after new info Call Customer varies in C001 to request missing docs C002 first to clarify discrepancy second to confirm C003 to prompt return Verify Documents in C003 first is physical second after adjustment
